title: spirillus natans
intro: Spirillus natans, also known as the floating fern or water fern, is a type of aquatic fern that thrives in freshwater environments. The medicinal properties of Spirillus natans lie in its ability to lower inflammation and fever, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Spirillus natans are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
